_doc: Per-source bowl arrangements as [left, middle, right] from observer view (camera behind robot). Used by src/data/prompt_aug.py to generate ordinal/relational/negation prompts at training time. Episode ranges are inclusive on both ends. Empty after the 20260509 dataset refresh: the new augmented HF datasets bake prompt + lighting variation into the parquet, so the PromptAugmentingDataset wrapper is no longer used by the eval{1,2,3} configs. Kept as `{}` (not deleted) so any loader that opens this path still parses clean.
